text:
The Quadrupedal Titan is a student at Marley Academy and one of the Nine Traps set up by Willy Tybur.

Appearance

Personality

Story

When Eren and his friends went through one of the Nine Traps to get into Marley Academy, the Quadrupedal Titan, disguised as a shark, appeared from the swimming pool and attacked Jean.
